name: Nightly Build (npm)
description: Run an npm script (build, lint, …) for a project every night and capture the log.

parameters.label: Project path
parameters.help: Folder containing package.json (avoid spaces in the path).

parameters.label: npm script
parameters.help: The package.json script to run, e.g. build or lint.

parameters.label: Log file path
parameters.help: Where to write the build output.
